ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is contextually relevant and natural, but could improve in persona consistency by being more assertive.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>Basis of the priest's authority should be trust-building rather than immediate discounting, which is inconsistent with their ethical persona and context relevance.
